pr-evidence/release-evidence-source-fing.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer found that fingerprints were effectively mandatory for old sidecars; fixed by treating fingerprint fields as optional compatibility fields and validating them when present.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_release_evidence.py tests/test_release_bundle.py -> 76 passed
what_changed: Added size_bytes and sha256 fingerprints to file-generated release evidence artifact_sources.
Release bundle sidecar matching validates source fingerprints when present while accepting legacy sidecars without them.
Documented fingerprint behavior and added regression tests for changed same-path artifacts and legacy sidecars.
pr-evidence/release-evidence-source-fing.why: Release evidence should identify the exact artifact payloads it audited, while preserving compatibility with existing release-evidence sidecars.
